mapper.select:
SELECT uniqExact(concat(exception_type, '\0', exception_message)) AS total_clusters, count() AS total_errors, uniqExactIf(concat(exception_type, '\0', exception_message), timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AS new_clusters_24h FROM logs WHERE level = 'ERROR' AND exception_type != '' AND timestamp >= toDateTime64(#{params.startTime}, 3) AND timestamp <= toDateTime64(#{params.endTime}, 3)
AND service_name = #{params.serviceName}
